target: 6th Loop
59. Koba Mart, Again! (1)
You might be able to erase her... you mean Shiori!?
In Hiruko Cave... Haine almost messed with my head. She tried to get inside me...
So... if I trace that path backwards—
You can do the same thing to her?
Yes!!!
I don't really get it, but... It sounds like it's worth a try, right?
Yeah... Though truthfully, I'd like to bury her with my own hands...
…Last time, Nezu-san told me. About how 14 years ago, Sensei's twin brother, Ryunosuke-san, was killed by a Shadow...
About how Ryunosuke-san's body had strangulation marks on it, just like when Ushio was killed...
The one who killed Ryunosuke-san was Haine, wasn't it?
…That's right... And she was... my friend...
A friend?!
Ah... sorry, it's my phone...!
—It's from Mio!!
Answer it. We'll talk about the details later. You snuck out of the funeral to come here. It'll be suspicious if you don't go back.
Then I'll head back for now. Let's meet at Koba Mart at 6!
(…She's alive... The vibration of my smartphone tells me that Mio is alive...)
(I won't let Mio die ever again...!! No matter what happens!!)
Nezu-san, are you ready?
I was ready before ya were even born.
I'm good to go anytime too!
(Ushio is transformed into my wristwatch... Once there's no one around, I'll turn her back to normal.)
(And then... I'll erase Haine. The four-armed Shadow's precious Haine, right now! Today, right here!!)
(If I do that, I can save everyone from the end of that summer festival!!)
(Haine is everyone's enemy! Even if she looks like Shiori-chan, I don't have a shred of hesitation left!!)
(I won't let things go the four-armed Shadow's way anymore! We're going to... destroy his plan!!!)
Hizuru Minakata
Ah, Hizuru!!
Sorry to bother you during dinn— No, my apologies.
Shinpei Ajiro
It's about time... you can come out now, Ushio!
Hup!!
Transforming, fighting... You're like something out of an anime...

Shinpei, Shinpei!
I just realized something amazing!
Wh-What is it?
These clothes, they're what I was wearing before we met Sou, right? Do you know why I'm wearing them now?
You can <color=#GF_TIPS_080>carry over</color> data scanned in the previous loop <color=#GF_TIPS_080>to the next loop</color>!!
Amazing, right!?
Yeah, it's amazing... you're amazing, Ushio!!
(I see... We might be able to try a lot of things with this...!!)
(Let's sort out the weapons we can use first...)
(Of the two Nezu-san brought, I'll call Nezu-san's "Nail Gun A", and the one I broke last time "Nail Gun B".)
(Ushio scans Nail Gun B again. She overwrote the broken old nail gun, then erased the original.)
(With this, Nail Gun B (Shadow) is usable again.)
(I wanted to copy Nezu-san's Nail Gun A too, but Ushio's brain storage was full, so I gave up.)
(So basically, as long as I have Ushio reprint it, I can shoot Nail Gun B as many times as I want.)

By the way, Shinpei.
Ryunosuke has been in the house for five minutes…
We should be getting a message on this phone soon, right? Saying, "Changing to Plan B."
Yes... And about two minutes after that message, Shiori will come down from the third-floor balcony.
Nezu-san, please attack with the nail gun. The third shot will miss, and Shiori will run toward that matcha soft serve flag.
That's where I'll catch her...
And I'll erase her at the end...!!
Yeah. …First, we wait to hear from Ryunosuke-san!
Eh!?
Wh...
(Whaaaaaat!!?)
...R... Run away...!! Please...
This is already... different from the 22nds... up until now—
H…Hizuru!!!
…Well hello, everyone. You're all here.
...Why...!? Why... are you... here...!?
You don't play fair, Shinpei-kun...!!
What…!?
I told you back then, didn't I. "Found you"...
The handprint on your right arm... That's a <color=#GF_TIPS_103>mark</color>...
No matter what world you go to from now on, I can find you right away.
Do you understand? I've been chasing you this whole time... Our eyes met, didn't they? At the end of that summer festival...
I can loop too...
I knew you'd come to Koba Mart today when I looked into Ryunosuke's memories last time!
...Th-That's... ridiculous...
We don't need two observers. Mother. Or you.
The world seen by the one who survives at the end... is the fact!!!
Bring it on!!! I'll kill ya!!!!
Alright! Three shots—
It's useless.
Gah!!
(The "Shadow Stitch"... isn't working!?)
(Nezu-san's nails pierced his shadow three times...! And yet...!)
(It's over if this keeps up! I have to find a way to die!)
I won't let you die, Shinpei-kun.
O... h no... he caught me!
Eh... what... is this...? Eh...? Eh...!!?
(This voice...)
Oh, Kaori Koyuba-san. I've been seen by the person I least wanted to be seen by.
(Now! Ushio, my head—)
Shinpei!!
(That's... right... good...)
(Thank you... Ushio... Cut off... my head...)
...Tch! He looped...
We were one step away from capturing Shinpei-kun...
Good grief, it's because of that unnecessary interference.
No, what... what is going on?
She can't be used anymore now that this has happened, you know? What will you do?
You know without me having to say it.
Good grief, you're quite the glutton.
Shut up.
Consider this a greeting, Shinpei Ajiro...!!
Repeat it as many times as you like... Each time I will track you down, and finally seal that power of yours...
(I was naive...!! I should have anticipated it!! That the enemy has the same power!!! Haine also came from that summer festival...!!!!)
(I let two people die!!! Because of my naivety...!! And I dragged Kaori-san... into it too...!)
Sorry! Did your neck hurt!? I swung as hard as I could!!
I'm fine! You did great!!
More importantly, don't do anything reckless!! You scanned that guy at the end, didn't you!?
Your ego? Are you okay!?
I'm fine! I only kept one arm!
Whose shadow the four-armed one is... I thought it'd be good if I could at least figure out his DNA or something.
But... it was empty. His body...
There's no data... How is he moving...?
…I see…
Do you think we can win? Against an enemy that can loop...!?
Haine probably isn't looping with her own power. She's just tagging along using your power.
So her next "starting point" should be the same as ours. The conditions are even! We can win! If it's us!!
Ushio…!
Eek!? Ugh... don't wrap your hand around the wristwatch! You scared me!!
Thank you...
62. Koba Mart, Again! (2)
Ugh... guh...!!
Ow...

You…
You're back…?
This is...!! Before we stormed Koba Mart...!!
S-Sensei...
"The raid is canceled."
"Let's lure out the four-armed one."
N-No, Sensei. The raid is... canceled...!!
…Tell me in detail.
Understood. But before that, let's leave this place.

Shinpei!
Where are you going?
I'm going to look for someone. If we don't hurry... I'll get her involved again!
...Huh?
(There she is! Just as I thought... it's Koyuba-san!)
Ah, Ajiro-kun! What a coincidence meeting you here...
...Um, who are the people behind you?
I'll explain everything soon. Sorry, but I need you to follow me quietly for now...!
...Y-Yeah!
Haine
Shiori's house…?
What's wrong, Shiori?
(Ushio cut off Shinpei's head and looped...)
Mom, what time is it!?
Let's see... it's six o'clock on the dot.
...Before, it started before we picked up the bones at the funeral. The starting point is getting delayed, isn't it...?
Shinpei and the others aren't in front of the store either... They must have run away...
Hey, Shiori! You can't walk around during dinner!
Okaaay!
What have you been talking about since earlier?
Don't worry about it, Mom!
It's just my own thing.
The starting point of the loop getting delayed might be because Shinpei-kun's power is weakening.
Yes. The limit of the observable time is narrowing each time he dies.
Ufufu! This is a good discovery...
Then, just like he said, let's make him loop over and over again. Until he exceeds his limit.
If we keep killing Shinpei-kun over and over, eventually he won't be able to loop and will meet his true death?
Exactly. We'll whittle his life down to nothing. It's easier than capturing him alive... Right? Shide.
Yes…
Asako-chan, seconds please.
Sensei... Let's lure out the four-armed Shadow.
What? Tell me what you mean.
Haine is looping too, just like me...! So they already know about this raid.
The Kobayakawa house has that four-armed Shadow—Shide—waiting for us, and we'll... all be slaughtered...!
...So we retreat...
No. That's exactly why we should do it here!
What do you mean?
We know their greatest fighting force is there. Normally, it would be best to regroup... If the enemy is thinking the same thing, now is the time to attack!
If Ushio hacks Haine, we might be able to erase Shide completely. ...The chances of that are high.
Nagumo-sensei, Nezu-san, and I will lure Shide out, and Ushio will take out Haine as fast as she can—
We don't even need to defeat Shide. As long as we can buy enough time for Ushio to erase Haine, that's enough.
They won't expect us to challenge them again after losing so badly in the previous loop.
Sounds good, we'll catch them off guard!
…Hm. But thinking that erasing Haine will also defeat Shide seems a bit optimistic...
Either way, we don't have time for a long chat. Could you share the future you saw with us?
Right. Ushio, materialize right n—
Get down!!!
Gah…!?
Hizuru! Are you alright!!!
No...! Protect Shinpei-kun over me...!! *Cough*! *Gobo*...!
That's no good.
Sneaking around having a chat during dinner time. Isn't that a nuisance to the neighbors?
A-Ah... Aaaaaaaaaaaah!!!
(My arm... got blown off!! Along with the watch Ushio transformed into...!)
Ushio... Ushio!! Are you safe!?
Answer me!! Ushio!!!!!!
Tch!!!
You haven't shared your information well. You should have told them that nail guns don't work on me...
What's the meaning of this!!! Is this guy not a Shadow!?
Even a rifle is useless. I won't die from something like that.
I made sure to take out the only one who could resist me, Ushio-chan, first... It's checkmate for you all.
N-No... way...
Now, I'll take my time with the rest of you, one by one...
Oh? It seems that shot hit Hizuru-chan as well.
Guh... Ah...
Were you trying to protect Ushio-chan? How admirable.
Well, the order doesn't really matter anyway.
Don't you underestimate us!!!!
Gah...!
(Nagumo-sensei... Nezu-san...!)
(It's my fault...! Because of my bad judgment, everyone...!!)
So Haine, what will you do with Shinpei-kun?
The starting point of the loop is getting delayed. The limit of the observable time seems to be narrowing each time he dies.
The next time he dies, he'll only go back a few dozen seconds. To a world where Ushio is already dead. We'll kill him again while he's still in despair.
It's easier than taking him alive. We'll whittle his life down to the very limit.
Fufufufu... Shinpei-kun? I was told about this, you know?
When you drank poison to loop, apparently you said something like this...
"Once is enough"...
That's right... You get the rug pulled out from under you just when you get cocky. You should have just run away.
D-Damn it...! Damn... it...!
Well, there's no point in telling you the strategy for a game that's already over.
I'm looking forward to seeing your expression twisted in even greater despair.
Well then... see you again.
